sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product Syncronizes permissions of all users that have records in OU Members table.
Release Introduced: 2.5 - This script syncs the global roles for the user for all entries for the user in the Member Table.
Purpose: - Sync all member table records
Validation: - After running open list of all Organizational Hierarchy x_153465_discovert_discover_office_members_list.do - Group by Member User - Show all Global Roles, Tasker Application Admin, Task Administrator, Global Hierarchy Administrator, Task Executive, Template User, Global Template User - All of these roles should be the same for all member entries
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "Member Name:[memName] - - Error in 'Synchronize OU Member Permissions' - exception: " + error
If any Roles are not synced, please notify DTech Apps Support team.
sys_script_fix.name: Synchronize OU Member Permissions
